This fixture tests mixed LTR/RTL content — English prose with an inline Farsi phrase and a code block. The server name is prod-web-1 and the admin said:
این سرور نیاز به ری‌استارت دارد
Here is the relevant config: 
server:
  name: prod-web-1
  region: ir-tehran-1
After the restart, check systemctl status nginx to confirm.
